CREATE TABLE example_namespace (id INT, xml_data ANY);
INSERT INTO example_namespace (id, xml_data) VALUES (1, xtree_doc('<root xmlns:ns1="http://example.org/ns1"><child/></root>'));
INSERT INTO example_namespace (id, xml_data) VALUES (2, xtree_doc('<root xmlns:ns2="http://example.org/ns2"><child/></root>'));
SELECT xml_namespace_scope(xml_data, 1) FROM example_namespace WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xml_namespace_scope(xml_data, 1) FROM example_namespace WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT xml_namespace_scope((SELECT xml_data FROM example_namespace WHERE id = 1), 1);
SELECT xml_namespace_scope(xml_data, 1) AS ns_scope FROM example_namespace WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM example_namespace WHERE id = 2);
CREATE PROCEDURE test_ns_scope (IN entity ANY, IN use_ns INT) BEGIN DECLARE ns_vector ANY; SET ns_vector = xml_namespace_scope(entity, use_ns); SELECT ns_vector; END;
WITH ns_data AS (SELECT xml_data FROM example_namespace WHERE id = 1) SELECT xml_namespace_scope((SELECT xml_data FROM ns_data), 1) AS scope_output;
CREATE TABLE nested_example (id INT, parent_id INT, xml_data ANY);
INSERT INTO nested_example (id, parent_id, xml_data) VALUES (1, NULL, xtree_doc('<root xmlns:ns1="http://example.com/ns1"><child/></root>'));
INSERT INTO nested_example (id, parent_id, xml_data) VALUES (2, 1, xtree_doc('<child xmlns:ns2="http://example.com/ns2"/>'));
SELECT xml_namespace_scope(xml_data, 1) FROM nested_example WHERE parent_id IS NULL;
SELECT xml_namespace_scope(xml_data, 1) FROM nested_example WHERE parent_id = (SELECT id FROM nested_example WHERE id = 1);
SELECT xml_namespace_scope((SELECT xml_data FROM nested_example WHERE id = 2), 1);
